headline: Phillies Mascot Hosts New MLB All-Star Week Stay on Booking.com: The Phanatic's Phantastic Pad
summary: Booking.com, the Official Online Travel Partner of Major League Baseball, today announced The Phanatic's Phantastic Pad, a one-of-a-kind stay launching for MLB All-Star Week in Philadelphia. For the first time ever, the Phillie Phanatic – a 6' 6" flightless green mascot with more followers than the players he heckles – is opening a Phanatic-themed two-bedroom apartment in the heart of the city to one lucky booker and their guest. headline: Smart Summer Escapes: Agoda Reveals Asia's Most Affordable Summer Flight Routes
summary: As the summer holiday season approaches, digital travel platform Agoda reveals the most affordable domestic and international flight routes across Asia. For travelers making their summer vacation plans, Agoda's latest data offers insights into the routes and destinations that offer the best value to maximize budgets without compromising experience.
